reason: This is a general religious/motivational tweet about starting the day with prayer and faith. It translates to 'Every morning tell your hearts they deserve happiness, read prayers for them and entrust them to God and be assured.' Contains no ISIS-specific content or extremist ideology.
original_post: كل صباح أخبروا قَلوبكم أنّها تستحقْ الفَرح ، إقرأوا لَها الأذكَار وإستودعها اللّه وكُونْوا مطمئنين..
